scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build:frontend:web && npm run build:frontend:admin
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:backend:node && npm run build:backend:rust
scripts.build:backend:node: npm run build -w backend/shared/node-common && npm run build -w backend/services/user-service
scripts.build:backend:rust: cd backend/services/order-service && cargo build --release && cd ../payment-service && cargo build --release
scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:backend: npm run test -w backend/services/user-service && cd backend/services/order-service && cargo test
scripts.install:rust: cd backend/services/order-service && cargo build && cd ../payment-service && cargo build
